name: Savita Oil Technologies Limited
summary: Savita Oil Technologies Limited manufactures and sells petroleum products in India. It operates through two segments, Petroleum Products and Wind Power. The company offers transformer oils, white oils, liquid paraffins, lubricating oils, petrolatum and petroleum jellies, cable filling compounds, and optic fiber compounds. It also offers waxes and wax derivatives, such as microcrystalline, polyethylene, and oxidized polyethylene waxes, as well as wax emulsions. The company markets and sells its lubricating oils under the Savsol brand name. In addition, it generates and sells wind power. The company also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Savita Chemicals Limited and changed its name to Savita Oil Technologies Limited. Savita Oil Technologies Limited was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
